name: Chuukichi
description: Chuukichi (中吉, Chūkichi) was a famed Kirigakure shinobi.  He was a well noted shinobi during his lifetime, enough to justify his inclusion as a sensor and a backup within Akatsuki's Surprise Attack and Diversion Platoon, alongside Deidara, Sasori and Shin.  Manga Debut: Chapter #516 Anime Debut: Naruto Shippūden Episode #261  (Source: Narutopedia)
